Meta.title: QR Art AI — Transform URLs into Stunning QR Code Art
Meta.description: Generate beautiful, artistic QR codes powered by AI. Turn any URL into scannable art. Free to try, instant results. Perfect for marketing, events, and branding.

PricingMeta.title: Pricing — QR Art AI | Plans & FAQ
PricingMeta.description: Compare Free, Pro, and Business plans for AI QR art. Start free with daily generations; upgrade for HD exports, SVG, and higher limits.

DashboardMeta.title: Generate QR Art — Dashboard | QR Art AI
DashboardMeta.description: Create scannable QR code art from any URL. Pick a style preset or custom prompt and download your result in seconds.

JsonLd.softwareDescription: Transform any URL into beautiful artistic QR codes. Choose from dozens of styles — watercolor, geometric, circuit board, floral, and more. All QR codes are guaranteed to scan.

faq.question: Do artistic QR codes still scan?
faq.answer: Yes! Our AI generates beautiful QR code art while preserving error-correction data. All codes are tested to scan correctly.

faq.question: Is the QR art generator free?
faq.answer: Yes! Generate up to 3 artistic QR codes for free daily. Upgrade for unlimited generations.

faq.question: What styles are available?
faq.answer: Dozens of styles including watercolor, geometric, circuit board, floral, neon, minimalist, and more.

Footer.tagline: Transform any URL into stunning QR code art using AI. Beautiful, scannable, and unique.
Footer.copyright: QR Art AI. All rights reserved.

Landing.heroSubtitle: Create beautiful, scannable QR codes powered by AI. Choose from dozens of art styles, customize with prompts, and download in seconds. Every code guaranteed scannable.
Landing.featuresSubtitle: The only QR generator that makes art — not just codes.

features.title: Always Scannable
features.description: Our AI ensures every QR code art piece is fully functional. Beautiful doesn't mean broken — every creation scans perfectly with any smartphone camera.

features.title: Generate in Seconds
features.description: No design skills needed. Enter a URL, pick a style, and get stunning QR art in 10-20 seconds. What used to take hours in Photoshop now takes seconds.

features.title: Unlimited Creativity
features.description: Choose from curated style presets or write custom prompts. Cyberpunk, watercolor, galaxy — if you can describe it, we can create it.

features.title: High Resolution
features.description: Download in up to 4K resolution. Perfect for print materials, posters, business cards, and merchandise.

features.title: Custom Branding
features.description: Match your brand aesthetic. Use custom prompts to incorporate your brand colors, themes, and visual identity into every QR code.

features.title: Unlimited Variations
features.description: Not happy with the first result? Regenerate with one click. Each generation creates a unique variation of your QR art.

Landing.howSubtitle: From URL to artwork in under a minute

steps.title: Enter Your URL
steps.description: Paste any URL — your website, social profile, portfolio, or any link you want to share.

steps.title: Choose a Style
steps.description: Pick from curated presets like Cyberpunk, Japanese Garden, or Galaxy — or write your own creative prompt.

steps.title: Download & Share
steps.description: Get your AI-generated QR art in seconds. Download as PNG and use it anywhere — print, digital, social media.

useCases.description: Stand out in print ads, flyers, and billboards with QR codes people actually want to scan.
Replace boring QR codes with artistic ones that match your brand and make a lasting impression.
Create memorable event badges, posters, and materials with scannable art that drives engagement.
Share beautiful QR art that links to your profiles, driving followers from any platform.

Landing.pricingSectionSubtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees.
Landing.finalBody: Join creators, marketers, and businesses using AI to transform ordinary QR codes into works of art.

PricingPage.subtitle: Start free with 3 generations per day. Upgrade anytime for more generations, higher resolution, and premium features.

faqItems.question: Can I try it before paying?
faqItems.answer: Yes! The Free tier gives you 3 QR art generations per day with no sign-up or credit card required. Try it out and upgrade when you need more.

faqItems.question: Are the generated QR codes really scannable?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. Our AI is specifically tuned to maintain QR code scannability while adding artistic elements. Every generated code is designed to scan with any standard smartphone camera.

faqItems.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can cancel your Pro or Business subscription at any time through the customer portal. Your plan will remain active until the end of your billing period.

faqItems.question: What image formats can I download?
faqItems.answer: Free and Pro users can download PNG files. Business users get additional format options including SVG and PDF, perfect for print production.

faqItems.question: Do I own the generated QR art?
faqItems.answer: Yes. All QR art you generate is yours to use commercially. Business plan users get an explicit commercial license for agency and client work.
